name: Maple Syrup and Brown Sugar Banana Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the brown sugar and margarine until smooth.
2. Add the eggs, followed by the mashed bananas, maple syrup, and milk. Mix thoroughly.
3. Sift together the dry ingredients (flour, baking soda, baking powder, and salt) and add them to the wet mixture. Mix until just combined.
4. Pour the batter into a greased 6x10 inch loaf pan.
5. Bake at 350°F for 40-45 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
6. Sift confectioners' sugar over the bread once it has cooled.
